subject: Add Supabase forms schema, API endpoints, and validation
body:
Implement the full backend for the Four Ems form builder:

- Supabase migration: forms and form_submissions tables with RLS policies,
  indexes, and auto-update trigger
- Shared libraries: types, Supabase client, slug generation, auth middleware
  (Supabase anonymous auth), field condition evaluation, and submission
  validation (type checks, required fields, conditional visibility)
- Authenticated API endpoints: CRUD for forms, publish, list submissions,
  update submission status
- Public API endpoints: fetch published form by slug, submit responses with
  server-side validation and optional SMTP notification
- Updated vercel.json CORS to allow PUT/DELETE and Authorization header
- Added Supabase env var placeholders to .env.example

https://claude.ai/code/session_01DEWuDp8jGUxw39w6M5fNgn
title: Add Supabase forms schema, API endpoints, and validation
